title: obione frankenioides
intro: Obione frankenioides, also known as beach evening primrose, is a plant species belonging to the Onagraceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and potentially alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Beach evening primrose can be prepared through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, with recommended doses typically varying depending on the individual's needs and health condition.
